originalTitle: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
summary: Microsoft has created a special edition Xbox Series X to celebrate 25 years of the console. The Xbox 25th-anniversary console takes design cues from the original Xbox console, with both the console and controller featuring a translucent green design. "For the first time, we're bringing a translucent design to Xbox Series X, drawing inspiration from […]
content: Microsoft has created a special edition Xbox Series X to celebrate 25 years of the console. The Xbox 25th-anniversary console takes design cues from the original Xbox console, with both the console and controller featuring a translucent green design. “For the first time, we’re bringing a translucent design to Xbox Series X, drawing inspiration from the original Xbox and OG Green so many players remember,” explains Jason Ronald, VP of next generation. “The Xbox Series X25 Limited Edition respects our history, with the power and performance of the Xbox Series X, including 1 TB of storage, and a design that reflects where we’ve been and the community that’s been with us along the way.” [Image: The top of the Xbox 25th anniversary edition. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/XBOX-Series-X25-Limited-Edition_2-1bfdd2858ad74a2180ff-1900x1080-1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] [Image: The Xbox X25 special edition controller. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/XBOX-Wireless-Controller-X25-Special-Edition_1-d75d6cc00415223ed301-1900x1080-1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] The X on the front of the console lights up green when you power this special edition console on, and there’s a 25th anniversary logo on the front, too. Microsoft says there will also be “a few hidden surprises throughout, as a thank you to the community.” The controller has the original ABXY colors, as well as bumpers that honor the original black and white buttons found on the Duke controller. “The back case and battery door are fully transparent, revealing the classic XBOX logo,” explains Ronald. Both the console and controller will be available in November, but Microsoft hasn’t announced an exact release date or all-important pricing just yet. [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1-INYU6FLgI]
chineseTitle: 微软 Xbox 25 周年纪念游戏机采用半透明绿色
chineseSummary: 微软打造了特别版 Xbox Series X 来庆祝该游戏机问世 25 周年。 Xbox 25 周年纪念版主机的设计灵感源自原版 Xbox 主机，主机和控制器均采用半透明绿色设计。 “我们首次为 Xbox Series X 带来半透明设计，灵感来自 [...]
chineseContent: 微软打造了特别版 Xbox Series X 来庆祝该游戏机问世 25 周年。 Xbox 25 周年纪念版主机的设计灵感源自原版 Xbox 主机，主机和控制器均采用半透明绿色设计。 “我们首次为 Xbox Series X 带来半透明设计，从许多玩家记忆犹新的初代 Xbox 和 OG Green 中汲取灵感，”次世代副总裁 Jason Ronald 解释道。 “Xbox Series X25 限量版尊重我们的历史，拥有 Xbox Series X 的强大功能和性能，包括 1 TB 存储空间，其设计反映了我们的发展历程以及一路陪伴我们的社区。” [图片：Xbox 25 周年纪念版的顶部。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/XBOX-Series-X25-Limited-Edition_2-1bfdd2858ad74a2180ff-1900x1080-1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] [图片：Xbox X25 特别版控制器。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/XBOX-Wireless-Controller-X25-Special-Edition_1-d75d6cc00415223ed301-1900x1080-1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 当您打开此特别版主机的电源时，主机正面的 X 会呈绿色亮起，并且正面还有 25 周年纪念标志。微软表示，“整个过程中还会有一些隐藏的惊喜，作为对社区的感谢。”该控制器具有原始的 ABXY 颜色，以及纪念 Duke 控制器上原始黑白按钮的保险杠。 “后壳和电池门是完全透明的，露出经典的 XBOX 标志，”Ronald 解释道。控制台和控制器都将于 11 月上市，但微软尚未宣布确切的发布日期或重要的定价。 [媒体：https://www.
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
